category_sources: Official trzsz site describes trzsz as a modern tmux-compatible file transfer tool.
source_facts.description describes simple file transfer tools similar to lrzsz and compatible with tmux.
display_name_sources: Official trzsz site and repository use the display name trzsz.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the repository documentation fallback.
Official trzsz.github.io site documents the project and links to related tool pages.
repo_sources: Official trzsz site and search result identify github.com/trzsz/trzsz as the official repository for trzsz.
source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official trzsz site.
tags_sources: Official trzsz site describes trz/tsz terminal file transfer and related SSH tooling.
source_facts.description identifies file transfer tools similar to lrzsz with tmux compatibility.
